A

addMagicUtilsMessages() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Persist currently loaded MagicUtils messages (ensures defaults exist).
args(Object...) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.MessageQuery
Sets the placeholder values.
audience(Object) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.MessageQuery
Resolves the message in the recipient's preferred language.
availableCodes() - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.BundledTranslations
Scans the classpath for bundled lang/*.json files and returns their language codes.
availableNamespacedCodes(String) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.BundledTranslations
Scans the classpath under /lang/<namespace>/ and returns every available language code.

B

bindClientLocaleSync() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Binds automatic player locale synchronization to the manager platform.
bindClientLocaleSync(Platform) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Binds automatic player locale synchronization to the provided platform.
BundledTranslations - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang
Loads bundled MagicUtils translations from /lang/<code>.json classpath resources.

C

clearAutoDetectedPlayerLanguage(Object) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Remove stored auto-detected language for an arbitrary player object.
clearAutoDetectedPlayerLanguage(UUID) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Remove stored auto-detected language for a player.
clearPlayerLanguage(Object) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Remove stored language preference for an arbitrary player object.
clearPlayerLanguage(UUID) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Remove stored language preference for a player.

CMD_HELP_NAV_NEXT - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

CMD_HELP_NAV_PREVIOUS - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

CMD_HELP_NO_COMMANDS_FOUND - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages
Help empty state when nothing matches.
CMD_HELP_NO_DESCRIPTION - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

CMD_HELP_OPTIONAL - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

CMD_HELP_QUERY_PREFIX - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

CMD_HELP_SENDER_UNAVAILABLE - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

CMD_HELP_SUBCOMMAND_DESCRIPTION - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

CMD_HELP_TITLE - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

CMD_HELP_UNAVAILABLE - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages
Help is unavailable because no manager is ready.
CMD_HELP_USAGE_OR - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages
Help usage separator between direct and subcommand forms.
CMD_HELP_VALUES - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

getScoped(String, Audience) - Method in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages
Get localized value for an audience using a scoped language manager with fallback to the global manager.
getScoped(String, Audience, String...) - Method in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages
Get localized value with replacements for an audience using a scoped language manager with fallback to the global manager.

Get localized value using a scoped language manager with fallback to the global manager.
getSections(String) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.BundledTranslations
Returns the translations grouped by section (the part before the first dot in each key).
getTranslations(String) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.BundledTranslations
Returns the flat key -> value translation map for the given language code, loading from classpath on first access.

L

language(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.MessageQuery
Forces resolution into the given language code, ignoring any audience preference.

Platform-agnostic language manager.
LanguageManager(Platform, ConfigManager) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Create a language manager bound to a specific platform.
LanguageManager(Object, ConfigManager) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Create a language manager, resolving a Platform from the provided platform or legacy plugin instance.
LanguageMetadata - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang
Language metadata

loadLanguage(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Load a language file into memory.
loadLanguageAsync(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Load a language asynchronously to avoid blocking the main thread.
loadLanguageSmart(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Load a language and return a future that completes when loading finishes.

M

MessageQuery - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang
Fluent builder for cases that don't fit the direct Messages.getRaw(java.lang.String), Messages.get(java.lang.String), or Messages.send(java.lang.Object, java.lang.String) methods — primarily explicit language pinning and manual escape-mode control.
Messages - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang
Global entry point for resolving and sending localized messages.
MessagesView - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang
Scope-aware mirror of Messages.

P

putCustomMessage(String, String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageConfig
Adds or updates a custom message entry.
putCustomMessage(String, String, String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Add or update a custom message for a specific language (or current language when null).

query(String) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.Messages
Starts a fluent message resolution against the default manager.
query(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.MessagesView
 

R

raw() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.MessageQuery
Resolves to a plain string.
register(String, LanguageManager) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.Messages
Registers a scoped (per-plugin) language manager.
registerBundledTranslations(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Loads every /lang/<namespace>/<code>.json file the classpath exposes and registers them as bundled translations for this language manager.
registerTranslations(String, Map<String, String>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Register bundled plugin translations for a single language.
registerTranslations(Map<String, Map<String, String>>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Register bundled plugin translations for multiple languages.
reload() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Reload all loaded languages from disk.

RELOAD_ALL_SECTIONS - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages

RELOAD_COMMAND - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages
Single command reloaded.
RELOAD_GLOBAL_SETTING - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages
Single global setting reloaded.
RELOAD_GLOBAL_SETTINGS - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages
All global settings reloaded.
RELOAD_SECTION - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.InternalMessages
Single section reloaded.
reloadAsync() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Reload all loaded languages asynchronously.
ReloadMessages - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.messages
Reload messages.
ReloadMessages() - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.messages.ReloadMessages
Default constructor for ReloadMessages.
reloadSmart() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Reload all loaded languages, auto-switching to async on sensitive threads.
resolveOverride(Object, String, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.Messages
Returns configured (with placeholders applied) when it is an override; otherwise falls back to localizing key for the recipient.
resolveSupportedLanguageCode(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Resolve a supported language code from a client locale tag or language code.

saveCustomMessages(String, Map<String, String>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Persist custom messages into the language file.
scope() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.MessagesView
 
send() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.MessageQuery
Sends the resolved component to the audience set on the builder.
send(Object) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.MessageQuery
Sends the resolved component to the given recipient, overriding any previously-set audience.
send(Object, String) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.Messages
Resolves a key in the recipient's language and sends it as an Adventure component.

send(Object, String, Object...) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.Messages
Resolves a key with placeholders (values escaped) and sends the component to the recipient.

Assign an auto-detected language for an Audience.
setAutoDetectedPlayerLanguage(UUID, String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Assign an auto-detected language for a player based on client locale data.
setFallbackLanguage(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Set fallback language used when a key is missing in the current language.
setLanguage(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager

setLanguageAsync(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager

Sets the default (global) language manager.
setLanguageSmart(String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager

setPlayerLanguage(Audience, String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager

setPlayerLanguage(Object, String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Assign a preferred language for a player-like object (expects getUniqueId()).
setPlayerLanguage(UUID, String) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.LanguageManager
Assign a preferred language for a player.
